title: SLAM-based Autonomous Mobile Robot System
description: A mobile robot system created as a major project at IIEST Shibpur, utilizing OpenCV, A* algorithm, and Python to enable the robot to navigate complex environments and make informed decisions in real-time.
techStack: Python, Open CV, A* algorithm, Raspberry Pi

title: Real-Time Indian Sign Language Recognition Using Deep Learning
description: Developed a CNN-based real-time hand gesture recognition system for 35 Indian Sign Language gestures using TensorFlow. Implemented hand segmentation, image preprocessing, and data augmentation to improve classification accuracy.

title: Audio Message Transcription System for Voice Messages
description: Developed a prototype audio message transcription system that converts voice messages into text using speech recognition. Built with FastAPI, HTML, and Jinja, with the concept and prototype created in 2023 before similar features were introduced in WhatsApp (November 21, 2024).
techStack: HTML, Python, FastAPI, Telegram Bot API (telebot for testing), NLP

title: Prasanth Kumar - Portfolio Website
description: The current portfolio you are viewing. A minimalist portfolio designed with a focus on responsive user experience.
